title: mitrasacme retroloba
intro: Mitrasacme retroloba, also known as the woolly mitrasacme or woolly mitra, is a plant species belonging to the family Boraginaceae, commonly found in Australia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits associated with Mitrasacme retroloba include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, and to treat skin conditions like eczema and dermatitis. Mitrasacme retroloba is traditionally prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping the leaves in hot water, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
